commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an unmocked custom-provider image auth regression test and updates split agents Vitest config routing plus coverage.

PR surface: Tests +203, Other +8. Total +211 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main failing issue: the production fix already merged in the linked predecessor, and this branch adds regression coverage plus script-routing verification for that path.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer review or landing for a protected, focused PR with no actionable findings.

target.title: test(tools): add unmocked image custom-provider auth regression
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `image-tool.custom-provider-auth.regression.test.ts` to cover the user-reported custom-provider image auth bug with **unmocked** `model-auth` and helper wiring.
- Exercises config-only `models.providers.<id>.apiKey` auth through `hasProviderAuthForTool`, `resolveImageModelConfigForTool`, production image-tool factory availability, and deferred `execute` with real `getApiKeyForModel`.
- Includes negative coverage when `apiKey` is missing, plus a regression note for the pre-fix `hasAuthForProvider`-only candidate filter.

Follow-up to #85570. Existing `image-tool.test.ts` coverage mocks `model-auth`, so it cannot prove the shipped auth resolution path end-to-end.

Also fixes split agents Vitest routing in `scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs` so `agentsCore` / `agentsPiEmbedded` / `agentsSupport` / `agentsTools` configs route to themselves instead of the tooling config.

## Verification

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/image-tool.custom-provider-auth.regression.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts -t "routes split agents vitest config"
```

Behavior addressed: custom provider vision models configured only via `models.providers.<id>.apiKey` should auto-discover and execute on the deferred image tool path without env keys or auth profiles.

Real environment tested: Linux source checkout on latest `main` with Node 22.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/image-tool.custom-provider-auth.regression.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: 5/5 tests passed in the new regression file (Vitest run on branch head).

Observed result after fix: config-backed custom provider auth resolves image model config, registers the tool, resolves runtime API key from config, and executes without "No image model is configured".

What was not tested: live gateway/channel roundtrip, e2e-go smoke, or changes outside the new regression test file and agents vitest routing fix.
target.author: hxy91819

commands.reason: ClawSweeper human-review marker targets a stale PR head SHA
